client_state.scope: UI state, temporary game state, user preferences
client_state.persistence: localStorage for preferences, IndexedDB for large state

structure.gameStore: Current battle, army, inventory, active quests

server_state.scope: Player data, leaderboard, shop inventory, config

realtime_state.scope: Global announcements, world boss HP, guild chat, live leaderboard
realtime_state.subscription_management: Auto-subscribe on relevant screens, unsubscribe on leave

anonymous_session.creation: On first visit, create anonymous Supabase user
anonymous_session.upgrade_path: Anonymous user can link email/password or Google account
anonymous_session.data_retention: Anonymous data kept for 30 days, then purged if not upgraded

authenticated_session.creation: After email verification or OAuth callback
authenticated_session.expiration: 1 hour access token, 7 day refresh token

session_recovery.reconnect: Sync local state with server, resolve conflicts
session_recovery.conflict_resolution: Server wins for currency/progress, client wins for preferences

offline_support.indexeddb: Store game state, action queue, assets
offline_actions: Battle (HYBRID: simulated locally, action log synced to server for verification and reward processing)

sync_strategy.conflict_handling: Timestamp wins. For battles: server replays action log to verify result. Mismatch = server verdict.
sync_strategy.error_handling: Retry 3x with exponential backoff, then notify user

auto_save.trigger: Every 30s during active play, on significant events (battle end, quest complete)
auto_save.compression: JSON compressed with lz-string for large states

cloud_save.cross_device: Same account = same save across devices
